breaks.scene_hint: Post-opening-act lull — the story is settling into a quieter investigative/dialogue stretch after early tension
Mid-film transition — characters regroup and discuss their next move in a relatively calm setting
Brief dramatic pause between two action-heavy sequences — a slower emotional beat

conservative_breaks.scene_hint: After Act 1 wraps up — tension briefly lifts as characters process early events in a dialogue-heavy scene
Mid-Act 2 scene transition — a calm moment of character reflection before the next threat escalates

relaxed_breaks.scene_hint: Late Act 1 — an exposition scene where characters exchange background information in a safe location
Act 1 resolution window — tension briefly settles into a quieter investigative dialogue stretch
Mid-film regrouping — characters strategize in a calmer environment between two tense sequences
Emotional interlude — a slower character-driven beat sandwiched between high-tension scenes
